FUNCTION: assert

  -> ("[205_scorcherPain.py] Boss stage is 0 - the boss fight has not been set up correctly - something has gone horribly wrong")
  -> ("[205_scorcherPain.py] Boss stage is 1 - scorcher should not be taking damage - something has gone horribly wrong")
  -> ("[205_wizardPain.py] Boss stage is 0 - the boss fight has not been set up correctly - something has gone horribly wrong")
  -> ("[205_wizardPain.py] Boss stage is 1 - wizard should not be taking damage - something has gone horribly wrong")
  -> ("[205_wizardPain.py] Boss stage is 3 - wizard is taking damage, however he should be dead - something has gone horribly wrong")
  -> ("[206_wizardDeath.py] Wizard dies and it's not stage 2")
  -> ("[206_wizardSpawn.py] Can't spawn robots, something horribly wrong and wizardSpawn is 0")
  -> ("A valid waypoint path couldn't be found in relBreadCrumbLoopD.py. This should not happen")
  -> ("Door count should not be less than 0")
  -> ("function_slamRobot was given an invalid entity as the activator")
  -> ("function_spawnMassAI could not find a valid location to spawn a small robit.")
  -> ("functionBreakWall_AdjustHeroPosition failed to get a valid hero relocation spot")
  -> ("functionRunBodyVulnerableLoop found > 0 Bodies but could not find a valid zoneflag.")
  -> ("lds_painRobot could not figure out a closest waypoint. Did someone remove the waypoints used here?")
  -> ("relBossAttack_Call_AirStrike was called with an invalid actor. This could mess with the unique name generation among other things.")
  -> ("simulator script called with gv_Sim=0. This will break progression.")
  -> ("simulatorReturn called with invalid value of gv_Sim. This will break progression.")
  -> ("Someone deleted a placed barrel used to generate the ice, fire or oil barrels in script cpp_map2/trigBarrelDispenser.py")
  -> ("The air strike attack was used during an invalid boss phase")
  -> ("The cnColAttackSpawnRevival script decided to spawn revival but failed to get an arm piece from the generated list.")
  -> ("The get random waypoint functionality could not get a random available waypoint from the 6 available at the arena end chosen. This means either a waypoint was deleted, more robots then waypoints were added, or a script is not cleaning up after itself.")
  -> ("unable to obtain a random point to spawn at")
  -> (dbgPrint)
  -> (s_dbgPrint)

  -> (szChildName, szMineName, "")
  -> (szHarmEntName, szParentName, "preserve_armpos")
  -> (szHarmEntName, szTurretName, "preserve_laserpos")
  -> (szHeadName, szParentName, "preserve_headpos")
  -> (szLightName, szHeadName, "preserve_light")
  -> (szTriggerName, szParentName, "")
  -> (szTurretName, szBaseName, "preserve_turretpos")
  -> (szTurretName, szParentName, "preserve_turretpos")
  -> (szWarnName, szMineName, "")
  -> (trigName, hazName, "preserve_Hook2")

--------------------------------------------------------
FUNCTION: randomFloat
--------------------------------------------------------
  -> (0, 1)
  -> (0, 359.9)
  -> (0.0 , 1.0)
  -> (0.0, 1.0)
  -> (0.0, 154.0)
  -> (0.0, 156.0)
  -> (0.0, 3.0)
  -> (0.0, 360.0)
  -> (0.0, 60)

FUNCTION: waypoints
--------------------------------------------------------
